name: vbn-style-agent-mcp
description: Valley by Night Style Agent MCP - Access to Art Bible documentation, rules, prompts, and chapters.

tools.name: getMCPInfo
tools.description: Get Style Agent MCP metadata from the database (name, version, path, etc.)

tools.name: listChapters
tools.description: List all available Art Bible chapter files with optional metadata from database

tools.name: getChapter
tools.description: Load a specific Art Bible chapter file by filename (e.g., 'Art_Bible_I_PORTRAIT_SYSTEM__.md')

chapter_file.description: Filename of the chapter to load (e.g., 'Art_Bible_I_PORTRAIT_SYSTEM__.md')

tools.name: getRules
tools.description: Load the distilled RULES.md file containing key aesthetic constraints and do/don't guidelines

tools.name: getPrompts
tools.description: Load the PROMPTS.md file containing prompt templates and construction guidelines

tools.name: searchArtBible
tools.description: Search across all Art Bible chapter files for a query string, returning matching chapters and line numbers

query.description: Search query to find in Art Bible chapters
